rawFiles.name: datahub-un-locode-code-list.csv
rawFiles.notes: Downloaded by data-automation collect-transport-sources into an ignored local output directory.

transforms: Map UN/LOCODE function codes to transportModes and locationTypes.
Hold ambiguous or suspicious rows for manual review.
reviewNotes: Imported 13 accepted Syria rows: 7 standalone public transport/trade locations and 6 airport identifier merges into accepted OurAirports records. Held 6 rows for review due out-of-country coordinates, unknown function codes, airport-only rows without accepted public airport confirmation, or mixed airport/ground functions that risk duplicate identity.
